'''''Empress' Diadem''''' was one of the [[Starship/Legends|starships]] in [[Talon Karrde]]'s [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operation. It was a modified [[YT-1210 light freighter/Legends|YT-1210 light freighter]] and during the [[Bacta War]] it was captained by [[Melina Carniss]]. A disk-shaped ship, it was armed with a [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] and [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launch tubes.

{{Ship-stub}}
